empathetic_output.support_response: We value your business and want to make things right immediately. Can you please provide me with more details such as your order number so we can look into this further?
empathetic_output.defactualized_prompt: I'm reaching out for the second time regarding my order <PRODUCT>, which was supposed to be a <PRODUCT> with express shipping for my wife's birthday in two days. However, when I opened the box in front of my family, I was embarrassed to find a coffee maker inside instead of the hub. I've already tried contacting support once and was advised to check the packaging for any mistakes, but it's clear that the wrong item was shipped. I urgently need this issue <ISSUE>ct delivered as soon as possible.
